# Orchestrator Controlled Change PR

## Change classification

- [ ] O-RT5 PR-first controlled change
- [ ] Plan-only / documentation / governance change
- [ ] Controlled write path pending approval
- [ ] No provider production write included

## Source plan / evidence

```text
Plan ID:
Source evidence files:
Change pack file:
```

## Scope

```text
Target repository:
Base branch:
Proposed branch:
Files changed:
```

## Approval boundary

- [ ] Human review required before merge
- [ ] Merge approval does not approve deployment
- [ ] Deployment approval is separate
- [ ] Provider write approval is separate
- [ ] DNS / FTP-SFTP / SQL / accounting / production / destructive actions are not included

## Required validation

- [ ] `./tests/Test-OrchestratorValidationSuite.ps1`
- [ ] `./tests/Test-OrchestratorPrFirstChangePath.ps1`
- [ ] `./tests/Test-OrchestratorChangePackSchema.ps1`

```text
Rollback or disable instructions:
```

```text
Decision:
Evidence used:
Action class:
Validation outcome:
Approval status:
```
